# ANPD Regulation on Dosimetry and Application of Administrative Sanctions

Jurisdiction: Brazil
Region: BR
Citation: Resolução CD/ANPD No. 4/2023
Authority: ANPD
Source URL: https://www.gov.br/anpd/pt-br/documentos-e-publicacoes/regulamento-de-dosimetria-e-aplicacao-de-sancoes-administrativas.pdf
Topics: accountability, security_breach, sensitive_data
Keywords: ANPD dosimetry, administrative sanctions, LGPD enforcement

## Summary
ANPD regulation on sanction calculation and enforcement factors under LGPD.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess sanction exposure and aggravating or mitigating factors.
- Maintain evidence of cooperation and governance.
- Use enforcement factors in risk scoring.
